## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Tavus and growthx.ai, focusing on content creation for Tavus's upcoming consumer product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tavus is launching a new consumer-focused AI product with features like calendar management and text/call capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Jack (Tavus) is eager to partner with growthx.ai for content creation, SEO, and programmatic plays to support the launch](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Current bottleneck: Awaiting update from Jesse (Tavus) on partnership status and legal approval](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Target audience for new product is broad; specific use cases and personas are still being defined](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

## Topics

### Tavus Product Launch

  - [Shifting focus from enterprise to consumer market](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [New AI assistant features: calendar management, text/call capabilities, agentic actions](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Launch timeline uncertain; some features still in development](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Potential use cases include personal assistant, language learning, job coaching](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Need for new content around consumer-focused AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Shift away from previous topics like deepfakes, celebrity AI](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Focus on conversational video AI, text AI, audio AI with consumer keyword focus](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Open to experimentation and growthx.ai's leadership in content direction](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

### SEO and Keyword Strategy

  - [Recent content pruning to remove non-converting topics](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Aim to improve rankings for top 3 keywords (specific keywords TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Targeting lower difficulty keywords (30-50) that may grow into larger clusters](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### Partnership Scope

  - [Content creation (daily publishing, pillar content)](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic integrations](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Jack as primary point of contact; streamlined review process](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### Success Metrics

  - [Increase in leads from destination pages](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Conversions from sessions starting on content pages](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Improvement in overall keyword profile, especially top 3 rankings](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Enterprise: Varies, often roles with "AI" in the title](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Consumer: Broad target, specific personas still being defined](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Use cases include recruiting, support, coaching, personal productivity](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jack to follow up with Jesse about partnership status and legal approval](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Aim for clarity on partnership by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [If approved, move quickly to kickoff and content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Jack to keep Tyler (growthx.ai) updated on internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/xkP-EPsusoyr-t6B7xEsvDDkAupyD7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
